converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Jeffrey S. Lehman papers
Lehman, Jeffrey S.
Lehman, Jeffrey S. (Title of work: Reflections on the Call to Engagement..)
3-14-3395
5.6 cubic feet. 5.6 cubic feet.
2003-2005. Speeches Miscellaneous papers from the President's Office, including speeches. Also, "Reflections on the Call to Engagement," October 2004. Collection material in English 5187743
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Ariel Joy Conant
Date completed:
November 2006
EAD encoding:
Ariel Joy Conant, November 2006
Date modified:
RMC Staff, January 2016
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
President of Cornell University, 2003-2005.
General
The Cornell University Archives Web Archive has a collection copies of speeches and essays given by President Lehman here, click on Archives: https://wayback.archive-it.org/2566/20140615215452/http://cornell-classic.univcomm.cornell.edu/president/history_bio_lehman.cfm#
Cite As:
Jeffrey S. Lehman papers, #3-14-3395. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Miscellaneous papers from the President's Office, including speeches. Also, "Reflections on the Call to Engagement," October 2004. Also DVD with Inauguration, Commencement, and State of the University speeches.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin. Consult the University Archivist.
Cornell University. President
